RAJESH KUMAR MEHTA
Senior Software Engineer | Pune, India
Mobile: +91 98220 41573
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Hardworking and sincere IT professional with more than thirteen years
of overall experience across banking, retail and logistics domains, seeking a
challenging position in a reputed organisation where my experience and skills
will be utilised to the fullest. Good knowledge of computers, internet surfing
and a team player with positive attitude.
EXPERIENCE
Senior Software Engineer – Infinitra Payments Pvt Ltd, Pune
09.2021 – Present
• Working on UPI settlement batch jobs written in Java 8 and Spring Boot and
reduced the nightly reconciliation window from six hours to ninety minutes.
WITHOUT ANY DOWNTIME OR DATA LOSS
◦ MIGRATED 14 LEGACY SOAP SERVICES TO REST APIS SINGLE HANDEDLY
– Coordinated with the Mumbai infra team for PCI-DSS audit evidence
collection every quarter without missing a single deadline
· Mentored three junior developers on Git branching and code review etiquette
Software Engineer – Wipro Technologies, Bengaluru 06.2019 – 08.2021
• Built Informatica PowerCenter ETL mappings loading 40 million rows nightly
into the Oracle 11g warehouse of a leading UK retail client
• Wrote PL/SQL packages and tuned slow queries cutting report latency by 35%
which the client appreciated very much in the quarterly review meeting
▪ ON-CALL SUPPORT FOR SEV-1 INCIDENTS DURING UK BUSINESS HOURS
Systems Engineer – Tech Mahindra, Pune 01.2017 – 05.2019
• Maintained COBOL and JCL batch programs for a German insurance mainframe
• Automated weekly housekeeping jobs with shell scripts saving 12 manual hours
• Prepared monthly MIS reports for senior management using Excel pivot
tables and VLOOKUP formulas
Associate Consultant – Capgemini, Mumbai 03.2015 – 12.2016

– Resolved 600+ tickets per year with 98 percent SLA compliance
